inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: The initial lump sum investment amount.

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: The amount added to the portfolio each month.

inputs.label: Annual Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected average annual return rate of the portfolio.

inputs.label: Investment Horizon
inputs.businessContext: Total number of years the investment will grow.

formulas.futureValue: initialInvestment * Math.pow(1 + annualReturnRate/12/100, years*12) + monthlyContribution * ((Math.pow(1 + annualReturnRate/12/100, years*12) - 1) / (annualReturnRate/12/100))
